name: xiaomi-mimo-copilot-chat
description: Bring your own MiMo API key to VS Code Copilot Chat. Adds Xiaomi MiMo models through the Language Model Chat Provider API.

xiaomi-mimo.temperature.description: Sampling temperature used for chat completions.

xiaomi-mimo.maxTokens.description: Optional max output token override. Use 0 to request each MiMo model's configured maximum.

xiaomi-mimo.maxInputTokens.description: Optional context size override advertised to VS Code. Use 0 to advertise each MiMo model's configured context window.

xiaomi-mimo.debugReasoning.description: Write provider reasoning_content to the MiMo output channel for debugging. Reasoning is not shown in Copilot Chat.

xiaomi-mimo.debugLogging.description: Write verbose request, response, and model registration diagnostics to the MiMo output channel.

xiaomi-mimo.requestTimeoutSeconds.description: Total request timeout in seconds for MiMo chat requests. The connection phase has a separate 60s timeout. Default reduced to 5 minutes since MiMo is a fast API.

xiaomi-mimo.streamIdleTimeoutSeconds.description: Streaming idle timeout in seconds. If MiMo stops sending response chunks for this long, the request is cancelled. Default 90 seconds.

xiaomi-mimo.showUsageStatusBar.description: Show the latest MiMo prompt/output/cache usage summary in the VS Code status bar after each response.

xiaomi-mimo.experimentalContextIndicator.description: Experimental: attempt to inject real token usage into the Copilot Chat context indicator using VS Code internals. May break on VS Code updates.

xiaomi-mimo.freeOnly.description: When enabled, only free MiMo models are shown in the Copilot model selector.

apiKey.title: MiMo API Key
apiKey.description: Enter your Xiaomi MiMo API key.
